title: Run live sample analysis and view result with glossary and provenance
description: Verifies a user can run the live sample from the landing page and land on the result page showing Marathi source, canonical English, glossary hits, and Lingo provenance.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample analysis entry point
Wait for the analysis overlay to finish
Verify the result page displays Marathi source content and canonical English output
Verify glossary hits and Lingo provenance are displayed

title: Analyze built-in sample PDF and view extracted Marathi with canonical English
description: Verifies a user can use the built-in sample PDF flow, complete browser-side preparation, and land on the result page with extracted Marathi and canonical English.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the entry point to use the built-in sample PDF
Submit the document for analysis
Wait for preparation and analysis to complete
Verify the result page displays extracted Marathi source content and canonical English output

title: Analyze pasted Marathi text and view canonical English with glossary hits
description: Verifies a user can paste Marathi text, submit analysis, and see Marathi source, canonical English, and glossary hits on the result page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a Marathi passage into the pasted text field
Submit the document for analysis
Wait for analysis to complete
Verify the result page displays the Marathi source content and canonical English output
Verify glossary hits are displayed

title: Refresh result page after live sample analysis and confirm content persists
description: Verifies that after completing live sample analysis, refreshing the result page still shows the analysis outputs for the current session/state model.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample analysis entry point
Wait for the analysis overlay to finish
Refresh the page
Verify the result page still displays Marathi source content and canonical English output

title: Keep existing localized translations when generating explanation and actions
description: User generates a localized translation first and then generates explanation and key actions, and all outputs coexist without removing earlier translations.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Open the target language selector
Select one target locale (hi-IN)
Generate the translations
Generate the plain-language explanation
Generate the key actions
Verify the localized output is still displayed alongside the result
Verify both explanation and key actions sections are displayed

title: Generate localized translations for selected locales without losing the canonical result
description: User selects one or more target locales and generates localized outputs that appear alongside the existing result while the canonical English remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Open the target language selector
Select two target locales (hi-IN and bn-IN)
Generate the translations
Verify localized outputs are displayed for the selected locales
Verify the canonical English result section is still displayed

title: Generate plain explanation and key actions and keep them visible together
description: User requests both a plain-language explanation and key actions and both outputs appear appended to the existing result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Generate the plain-language explanation
Generate the key actions
Verify a plain-language explanation section is displayed
Verify a key actions section is displayed

title: Run baseline comparison from result details and display comparison report and diffs
description: User runs a baseline comparison with a provided baseline id and the UI displays a comparison report and diffs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Click to open the expanded details view
Fill a valid baseline identifier into the baseline id field
Run the baseline comparison
Verify a baseline comparison report is displayed
Verify diffs are displayed for the baseline comparison

title: Recover from invalid upload by switching to sample PDF and successfully reaching results
description: Verifies a user can recover from an invalid non-PDF selection by using the built-in sample PDF and successfully reaching the result page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a non-PDF file in the upload control
Submit the document for analysis
Click the entry point to use the built-in sample PDF
Submit the document for analysis
Wait for preparation and analysis to complete
Verify the result page displays Marathi source content and canonical English output

title: Append translations in multiple runs and keep earlier translations visible
description: User generates translations for one locale and then for another, and both localized outputs remain visible together.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Open the target language selector
Select one target locale (hi-IN)
Generate the translations
Open the target language selector
Select a different target locale (bn-IN)
Generate the translations
Verify localized outputs are displayed for both locales
Verify previously generated localized output remains visible after the second generation

title: Load result details and show glossary, setup, and quality sections without breaking result context
description: User opens the expanded details view and sees glossary status, Lingo setup, and quality summary displayed in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Click to open the expanded details view
Verify glossary status information is displayed
Verify Lingo setup and quality summary information are displayed

title: Localized outputs remain visible after revisiting the result view within the app session
description: User generates localized outputs and confirms they are still visible after navigating away to details and returning to the result view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Open the target language selector
Select one target locale (hi-IN)
Generate the translations
Click to open the expanded details view
Click to return to the main result view
Verify the localized output is still displayed
Verify the canonical English result section is still displayed

title: Verify hidden demo glossary page loads and is consistent with glossary status surface
description: Operator opens the hidden glossary demo page and confirms glossary readiness information is displayed for verification.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo/glossary
Verify glossary readiness and term count information is displayed
Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Click to open the expanded details view
Verify glossary status information is displayed

title: Changing locale selections does not clear existing translations before generating
description: User changes the selected target locales without generating and confirms existing localized outputs remain displayed until a new generation occurs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Open the target language selector
Select one target locale (hi-IN)
Generate the translations
Open the target language selector
Change the selection to a different locale (bn-IN) without generating
Verify the previously generated localized output is still displayed
Verify no new localized output is displayed for the newly selected locale

title: Upload a non-PDF and see inline validation without starting analysis
description: Verifies that selecting a non-PDF file triggers a visible validation state and prevents progressing into PDF analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a non-PDF file in the upload control
Submit the document for analysis
Verify a file type validation error is visible

title: Submit analysis with no PDF and no pasted text and see missing-text validation
description: Verifies the UI blocks analysis submission when no input is provided and displays a missing-text validation message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Submit the document for analysis
Verify a missing-text validation error is visible

title: Show validation when running baseline comparison without a baseline id
description: User runs baseline comparison without providing a baseline id and sees a validation error instead of a report.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Click to open the expanded details view
Ensure the baseline id field is empty
Run the baseline comparison
Verify a baseline id validation error is visible
Verify no baseline comparison report is displayed

title: Attempt PDF analysis when no text is extracted and see no-text-extracted validation
description: Verifies that when PDF preparation yields no extracted text, the UI shows a no-text-extracted validation message and does not show a successful result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a PDF file that contains no extractable text in the upload control
Submit the document for analysis
Verify a no-text-extracted validation error is visible

title: Show validation when generating translations with no target locale selected
description: User attempts to generate localized outputs without selecting any target language and sees a validation error instead of translations.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start the live sample analysis from the landing page
Wait for the analysis to complete and the result page to load
Open the target language selector
Ensure no target locales are selected
Generate the translations
Verify a target-locale selection validation error is visible
Verify no localized outputs are added

title: Show an error when generating explanation for a nonexistent result id
description: User attempts to enrich using a nonexistent result id and sees a not-found error state rather than appended outputs.

steps.description: Navigate to /result
Initiate explanation generation using an invalid or nonexistent result identifier via the UI workflow if available
Verify a not-found error state is displayed for the requested result
Verify no new explanation output is added
